features.title: Features of QuickAid
features.p: Discover the tools that put safety, speed, and support at your fingertips. QuickAid makes handling emergencies simpler, smarter, and faster.

cards.p: One-tap emergency button with smart categorization. Select your emergency type for faster, more targeted response from first responders.
Interactive map showing nearby hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies with real-time availability, directions, and contact information.
Step-by-step first-aid instructions for common emergencies, written in simple language that anyone can follow during critical moments.
